478.reason: Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos+num >= tokens.size(); no bounds check.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos+num >= tokens.size(); no bounds check.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Lacks bounds checking, will throw IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos + num exceeds token list size.

583.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: using getPreTokenType(2) to detect function definitions is unreliable because it assumes every Decl ends before a '(' appears two tokens ahead, which doesn't align with the grammar structure]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  getPreTokenType(2) may access tokens.get(pos+2) which can be out of bounds if tokens list is too small. This can occur when the testfile is empty or contains very few tokens.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using getPreTokenType(2) to detect function definitions is unreliable because it assumes every Decl ends before a '(' appears two tokens ahead, which doesn't align with the grammar structure]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: getPreTokenType(2) accesses token at pos+2 which may be out of bounds or not representative of the actual grammar structure; should check current token type instead]

587.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: using getPreTokenType(1) to find main function is flawed because it doesn't properly handle the transition from FuncDef to MainFuncDef and may skip or misidentify tokens]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Similarly, getPreTokenType(1) may cause out of bounds.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: using getPreTokenType(1) to find main function is flawed because it doesn't properly handle the transition from FuncDef to MainFuncDef and may skip or misidentify tokens]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: getPreTokenType(1) checks pos+1, but main function starts with 'int' followed by 'main', so this condition fails to correctly identify the start of MainFuncDef]

410.reason: Error: According to the specification, the component name should be printed before completing the analysis of the component, i.e., before parsing its children (the first MulExp), not after. This print should be moved to the beginning of the parse method.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: According to the specification, the component name should be printed before completing the analysis of the component, i.e., before parsing its children (the first MulExp), not after. This print should be moved to the beginning of the parse method.

834.reason: Incorrect token type check; should be TokenType.RBRACE to correctly handle empty initializers according to the grammar rule InitVal → '{' [ Exp { ',' Exp } ] '}'

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Incorrect token type check; should be TokenType.RBRACE to correctly handle empty initializers according to the grammar rule InitVal → '{' [ Exp { ',' Exp } ] '}'
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Typo: should be TokenType.RBRACE to correctly check for the closing brace of the initializer list.
